summary: W826 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract and removes semantic-input/certificate-adapter route names from the product-success audit surface. The remaining task-4 blocker is the actual four-Prop bounded-derived infinity-category wrapper.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not yet contract-complete: BoundedDerivedInfinityCategory is still a four-Prop wrapper rather than stable infinity-category data constructed from Dbounded MetrizableLCA.
ProductSuccessDeclarations no longer cites the semantic-input/certificate-adapter route names, but it still lacks an original four-task completion witness.
The review packet does not yet contain the immutable-contract negative fixtures and clean extraction audit required for completion.
remaining_gaps: Task 4 is not yet contract-complete: BoundedDerivedInfinityCategory is still a four-Prop wrapper rather than stable infinity-category data constructed from Dbounded MetrizableLCA.

remaining_work: Replace the task-4 four-Prop wrapper with nullary or typeclass-resolved stable infinity-category data constructed from the actual bounded localization.
Make ProductSuccessDeclarations or OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations expose a real original-four-task completion witness.
Refresh the review packet with contract-specific negative fixtures, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit before any future product-success claim.
